metodos.codigoOriginal:
Create Cursor cGevcl (cChave1s c(70),gGrafico g,cLg1s c(150),cLg2s c(175),cLg3s c(150),cEmpresas c(50))
        Index On cChave1s Tag cChave1s

If Used('cGevcl')
                Use In cGevcl
        EndIf

LParameters lnLinhaCmb1
Local Array laCorGrafico1(5)
Local lcEscape,lcChave1,lnTmStr1

#Define TAB Chr(9)
#Define CRLF CHR(13)+CHR(10)

If Not Used('crGrafico1')
	Create Cursor crGrafico1 (gGrafico1s g(4), cChave1s c(100), cempresas c(254), ctitulo1s c(128))
EndIf

With ThisForm
	m.lcEscape   = Set('Escape')
	m.lcPoint    = Set('Point')
	m.lcOldPoint = Set('Point')
	m.lcSepar    = Set('Separator')
	m.lcOldSepar = Set('Separator')

	Set Escape Off

	GetProStrg('Intl','sDecimal','',@m.lcPoint,254)... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters loForm1

Local lnLeftIni1

With ThisForm
	.LockScreen = .t.
	m.loForm1 = Iif(Type('m.loForm1')=='O',m.loForm1,ThisForm)
	.SetAll('AutoSize',.t.,'Label')
	.SetAll('Format','K','TextBox')
	.SetAll('InputMask','','TextBox')
	.SetAll('MaxLength',0,'TextBox')
	.SetAll('BackStyle',1,'TextBox')
	.SetAll('Alignment',3,'TextBox')
	.SetAll('FontName','Courier New','TextBox')
	.SetAll('FontName','Courier New','ComboBox')
	.SetAll('FontSize',9,'TextBox')
	.SetAll('FontSize',9,'ComboBox')
	.FontN... [TRUNCADO]

Local lnRecno1

With ThisForm
	.LockScreen = .t.
	m.lnRecno1 = RecNo('crGrafico1')

	Select ('crGrafico1')
	Report Form SigPrGf1 Next 1 To Printer Prompt Noconsole

	If BetWeen(m.lnRecno1,1,RecCount('crGrafico1'))
		GoTo m.lnRecno1 In ('crGrafico1')
	EndIf
	.cntGrf2.cmbChave1.SetFocus
	.Refresh
	.Draw
	.LockScreen = .f.
EndWith
* Fim **************************************************************************************

With ThisForm
	.LockScreen = .t.
	.cntGrf1.oleGrafico1.ControlSource = ''

	If Used('crGrafico1')
		Use In ('crGrafico1')
	EndIf

	.Release
	.Refresh
	.LockScreen = .f.

	If Type('ThisForm.poForm1')=='O'
		.poForm1.LockScreen = .t.
		.poForm1.Enabled = .t.
		.poForm1.LockScreen = .f.
	EndIf	
EndWith
* Fim **************************************************************************************
